1006186.description: The Honeywell HL400-AM earplug dispenser features built-in antimicrobial properties to protect the dispenser against stains, discoloration and odors caused by mold, mildew and bacteria. This product does not protect users or others against disease-causing organisms. It is designed to maintain clean workspaces and offers enhanced cleanliness.

583520.title: VARIODYN ONE Digital Call Station DCS plus / DKM plus
583520.description: The VARIODYN ONE Digital Call Station DCS plus allows selection of loudspeaker circuits, transmission of voice announcements, gongs, and alarms. It connects via standard CAT5 cable to the VARIODYN ONE INC-D control device, supporting up to four simultaneous audio signals. Connection can be redundant, up to 300m via CAT5 or 20km via fibre-optic cabling. The DCS plus can be expanded with up to six DKM plus digital keyboard modules (PN 583526), providing up to 120 keys and LEDs per station. The microphone and cable connection are permanently monitored. It includes an external audio input/output for connecting devices like CD players. Features include 12 freely configurable keys with independent programmable LEDs, a built-in loudspeaker, and an electret gooseneck microphone. It is designed for high failure safety and cost-effective CAT5 cabling, and can be fitted into a desk surface.

product_models.name: Digital Call Station DCS plus
product_models.features: 12 freely configurable keys (with LEDs), 2 LEDs, 1 microphone, 1 loudspeaker, 1 external audio input, 1 external audio output

LCD.title: LCD80 Mimic Annunciator
LCD.description: The Honeywell LCD-80 is an 80-character, backlit Liquid Crystal Display (LCD) annunciator designed for use with Honeywell BC200 fire indicator panels (FIP). Up to 32 LCD-80 units can be connected onto a two-wire distributed ring. It operates in two primary modes: "Terminal" and "Annunciator" mode. Common features include an 80-character backlit LCD (20 characters x 4 lines), time and date display, and the ability to be remotely located up to 1000 metres from the control panel. It features a mutable local piezo sounder with alarm/fault/isolate resound and offers flush or surface mount options. The device utilizes an EIA-485 interface, supporting up to 32 units per FIP. In Terminal mode, the LCD-80 mimics the BC200 display, showing time, date, events, device type identifiers, and alarm/fault/isolate counts, with individual and scroll buttons for events and a mute function for the internal sounder. In Annunciator mode, it functions as a remote alphanumeric display module, showing up to 64 pre-programmed messages (60 characters each) activated by script events in the FIP, with scroll functionality for viewing multiple active messages.

specs.Display Type: 80-character backlit Liquid Crystal Display (20 characters x 4 lines)

MZ-PCWS77.title: SYSTEM HINTS NEWSLETTER APRIL 2024
MZ-PCWS77.description: The Honeywell Information, News and Tips (HINTS) monthly newsletter covers timely issues ranging from Honeywell Users Group and cybersecurity, to Priority Notifications, product releases and updates and more. This April 2024 issue includes highlights on Field Device Manager® R530.1 release, Managed Security Services (MSS) Next Generation platform, Experion PKS Computing Platforms announcement, an update on Rittal fans obsolescence, Experion MX QCS- Dell Computing Platform End of Life, Last Time Buy Announcement Update for Workstation Platforms, HPS Technical Notifications, and Product Revisions and Support Status.

P400-RU.title: NVIDIA Quadro P400 Professional Graphics Card
P400-RU.description: The NVIDIA Quadro P400 combines a 256 CUDA core Pascal GPU, 2 GB of ultra-fast GDDR5 memory, and advanced display technologies to deliver great performance for a range of professional applications. Its single-slot, low-profile form factor makes it compatible with even the most space and power-constrained chassis. It supports up to three 4K displays (4096x2160 @ 60Hz) with HDR color, providing a wide visual workspace for high-resolution viewing. Quadro cards are certified with a broad range of sophisticated professional applications, tested by leading workstation manufacturers, and backed by a global team of support specialists.

specs.form_factor: 2.713" H x 5.7" L, Single Slot, Low Profile
features: Dedicated hardware video encode and decode engines³

RA100Z.title: DNR Duct Smoke Detector
RA100Z.description: Model DNR Air Duct Smoke Detector uses photoelectric technology for the detection of smoke. This detection method, when combined with an efficient housing design, samples air passing through the duct and allows detection of a developing hazardous condition. When sufficient smoke is sensed, an alarm signal is initiated at the fire control panel monitoring the detector, and appropriate action can be taken to shut off fans, blowers, change over air handling systems, etc. These actions can facilitate the management of toxic smoke and fire gases throughout the areas served by the duct system.

29011.title: Style Variant 29011 LED CG-S Rettungszeichenleuchte
29011.description: Einseitig abstrahlende LED Rettungszeichenleuchte aus hochwertigem, UV-beständigem und halogenfreiem Kunststoff in LED-Technologie. Sie bietet eine große Auswahl an Siebdruck-Piktogrammscheiben mit einfacher Schnappmontage. Der Wartungsaufwand ist minimiert durch eine hohe Lebensdauererwartung der LEDs von bis zu 50.000 Stunden und verkürzten Inspektionsaufwand durch CEWA GUARD Technologie. Sie ermöglicht automatische Funktionsüberwachung von bis zu 20 Leuchten pro Stromkreis und reduzierte Installationskosten durch STAR-Technologie. Ein frei programmierbarer Mischbetrieb der Schaltungsarten pro Leuchte in einem Stromkreis ist möglich.

600GB-SAS3.5.title: Fulfillment for Contract Logistics
600GB-SAS3.5.description: Warehouse Star is a cloud-based Warehouse Management System (WMS) and Fulfillment solution designed by Bitergo GmbH (owned by DB Schenker AG) to help businesses ramp up their warehouses quickly and optimize logistics processes. It focuses on Warehousing, B2B, SaaS, and SCM, serving over 100 customers, handling 25,000 picks per day, and processing 1 million EDI transactions per month. Key benefits include a 50% faster ramp-up (simple warehouses in 2 days worldwide), a 40% increase in picking efficiency, fast onboarding of workers, easy connectivity to web shops and ERP systems, and on-demand pricing for seasonal peaks. Core functionalities cover lot management, serial number support, expiration dates, cross-dock movements, multi-tenant support, load support, value-added services, item-specific packaging, master data import via Excel, and open interfaces via REST-API. Add-ons include advanced reporting, AS/RS support, SAP + EDI connection, Forklift and AGV control, vendor-managed inventory, and customs/bonded goods. The system optimizes goods in and storage, picking, inventory, and shipping processes. It is compatible with Android-based mobile apps and selected hardware from leading scanner manufacturers like Zebra, Honeywell, Sato, Gigaset, and Nimmsta. A 30-day freemium trial is available.
600GB-SAS3.5.category: Warehouse Management System (WMS), Fulfillment Software, Logistics Software

802371.title: Optical smoke detector IQ8Quad with isolator

The detector is provided with an integrated isolator. A remote indicator can be connected.

804905.title: IQ8MCP electronic module with isolator
804905.description: Addressable electronic module suitable for use in the esserbus and powered loop with alarm latch and alarm indicator. Optional connection for conventional MCP. Without BUS connection, the detector operates as conventional MCP. Built-in loop isolator in the manual call point. An external detector zone (D-line) could be connected with up to ten conventional manual call points (internal Alarm resistor for each detector 1 KOhm) - e.g. Part No. 804900 or 804901 to this IQ8 manual call point model and configure required operation with tools 8000. When an alarm is triggered the address and the programmed additional text of the MCP IQ8 to which the conventional zone is connected are displayed automatically. Cable length of the D-line max. 500 meters! Features include: Slimline design, Low power consumption, Plug-in connection clamps, Optional terminal clamps, 2 x cable entries on top, at the bottom and on the rear panel, Fixing on standard flush mounted installation box, Test function via manual call point service key, Detectors that are not ready for operation can be marked with the "Out of order" label by reversing the enclosed operating front foil. Note: For a LARGE MCP, you have to order the electronic module and the MCP housing separately to have a complete MCP.
804905.category: Electronic module for Manual Call Point

808610.10.title: esserbus transponder 12 relays (8 bit)
808610.10.description: The esserbus transponder works as a loop device on the multi-functional primary line. With the 12 relays module, it is possible to expand the number of control zones per control unit. Depending on the control unit, it can be integrated or used with fire detectors in mixed operation. The esserbus transponder can be optionally extended by adding the additional isolator board Part No. 788612. esserbus transponder voltage supply: via the multi-functional primary line. The esserbus transponder can be wired with an external switching voltage of 12V DC or 24V DC for the K1 to K12 relays. The external voltage supply of the transponder can be programmed to be monitored in the customer data in the operating mode. In the "floating" operating mode, no external switching voltage of the relays is necessary. 11 relays are freely programmable. The maximum line length from the transponder to the external device is up to 1000 m.

features: Only one loop address is needed per transponder

A133230-00.title: COMMANDER Shotblasting Helmet
A133230-00.description: The Honeywell COMMANDER is a series of shotblasting helmets with air supply, offering proven solutions for users in harsh environments. These helmets provide high-level protection with comfortable pressure, featuring a rubber coating to reduce noise and wear. Key features include a low flow indicator for increased safety, shoulder, back, and chest protection via a cape, a disposable visor protecting the main visor, a mesh screen, and an adjustable headband for comfort. All parts are easily replaceable. The cape is available in three versions: leather, cotton, or waterproof bisonyl for chemical hazards. The helmet is polyester reinforced with fiberglass and has a rubber coating. It offers a focused field of view of 145mmx90mm with no visual distraction. Other available product numbers include A133230-00 (with bisonyl cape), A133730-00 (with cotton cape), and A133230-01 (with bisonyl cape).

features: Low flow indicator for increased safety
Shoulder, back and chest protection with cape
Disposable visor protecting the main visor

BWC4-Y-R.title: BW™ Clip4
BWC4-Y-R.description: The Honeywell BW™ Clip4 is a wearable, always-on four-gas detector designed for hassle-free operation with a 2-year continuous runtime, requiring no charging or battery or sensor replacements. It detects Hydrogen Sulfide (H2S), Carbon Monoxide (CO), Oxygen (O2), and Combustible Gases (LEL), offering dependable functionality, streamlined management with IntelliDoX, and compliance alerts.

specs.alarms: Visual, vibrating, audible (95 dB); Low, High, TWA, STEL, OL (over limit)
specs.self_test: Activated detectors automatically perform one internal diagnostic test every 24 hours (sensors, battery, and circuitry).
user_options: Adjust STEL period (5-15 minutes in 1 minute intervals)
Select combustible gases measurement: 0-100% LEL (Lower Explosive Limit) or Methane gas 0-5.0% v/v
Calibration due date (1 to 365 days, or set to zero for off)
specs.warranty: Full two-year warranty including sensors and battery
specs.notes: The LED IR combustible gas sensor used in Honeywell BW™ Clip4 cannot detect certain combustible gases including hydrogen and acetylene. The application should be reviewed to ensure adequate detection.

comfortable_fit: Durable, ergonomic and wearable - doesn't weigh you down
Compact profile - even working in tight spaces, you won't know you are wearing it
simpler_operation: Tamper-proof operation with just one button
Real-time gas concentrations shown on LCD
compliance_alerts: Flashing red non-compliance indicators warn workers that the detector has not been bump tested according to schedule
Daily full function self-test of sensors, battery status, circuit integrity, and audible/visual alarms
streamlined_management: Compatible with IntelliDoX docking system and instrument management system
dependable_functionality: Tested to last in extreme environments

certifications: Class I, Div 1, Group A, B, C, D Class I, Zone O, Group IIC
ATEX: II 1G Ex ia IIC T4 Ga
IECEx: Ex ia IIC T4 Ga
Conforms to all applicable European directives.

CATALIST.title: UOP R-264 CCR Platforming™ Catalyst
CATALIST.description: UOP's R-264 catalyst is a low platinum and high density spherical catalyst designed for use in continuous regeneration reforming units (such as the CCR Platforming™ process) for upgrading low-quality naphtha. It converts naphtha, in the presence of hydrogen, into high-octane reformate, hydrogen, motor fuel blending stocks for gasoline, BTX aromatics, and high-purity hydrogen for other refinery processes. R-264 provides maximum operational flexibility, allowing for increased throughput or higher yields through two modes of operation: high-activity or high-yield. Key benefits include excellent C5+ yields for motor fuel applications, excellent aromatics yields for BTX applications, excellent hydrogen yields, excellent activity to maintain required feed rate and octane target, low coke make from optimized metals content and unique base formulation, high yield stability over life of catalyst, and long catalyst life from high strength base and high chloride retention. It can be supplied in oxidized or reduced form, with reduced catalyst providing faster start-up and on-spec production. A higher platinum version is also available. Since its commercialization in 2004, more than 70 loads have been sold.

CF274A.title: HP LaserJet Pro 400 Printer M401 series

COLOR.title: Honeywell Industrial Safety Branding Guidelines
COLOR.description: This document outlines the branding guidelines for Honeywell Industrial Safety (HIS), a global provider of personal protective equipment (PPE) and gas detection devices. It details how distributors should consistently position and present Honeywell brands, logos, color palettes, and type-fonts. The guidelines cover the brand strategy, a five-tier hierarchy (Master, House, Endorsed, Standalone, Licensed Brands), logo usage rules (size, clear zone, backgrounds), trademark usage, wordmark elimination, legacy brand referencing, and best practices for promotional items and marketing material approval. Key color palette details include: Honeywell Red (#EE3124, R238 G49 B36, C9 M100 Y93 K0, PMS 1795), Honeywell Black (#000000, R0 G0 B0, C60 M40 Y40 K100, Munsell N2), Honeywell White (#FFFFFF, R255 G255 B255, C0 M0 Y0 K0, Munsell N9.5), Honeywell Grey 50 (#808080, R128 G128 B128, C0 M0 Y0 K50, PMS Cool Grey 8C, NCS S 5000-N), and Honeywell Grey 60 (#707070, R112 G112 B112, C0 M0 Y0 K56, PMS Cool Grey 9C, NCS S 6000-N).

CWR.title: Non-Addressable Audible Visual Devices (Sounders)
CWR.description: Honeywell's Non-Addressable sounder is a high quality device designed to alert building occupants of an emergency. The product features a new folded horn design which provides outstanding sound output at low current draw. With its modern design, global tone set and extensive installer-friendly features, the sounder is the logical choice for specifiers, installers and distributors. Available in various configurations including Red or White body colours, and low profile or deep/IP65 bases, offering 32 selectable tones and adjustable volume settings.

specs.Features: Two stage sounders for phased evacuation, Synchronised sound output

CWR.weight_g: 190g (low profile standard device); 197g (deep/IP65 standard device); 200g (low profile first fix option); 207g (deep/IP65 first fix option)

F750E-S0.description: This is an 80 PLUS Verification and Testing Report for the Dell F750E-S0 750W power supply, confirming its compliance with 80 PLUS standards. The report details input/output specifications, efficiency measurements at various load levels, power factor, and total harmonic distortion.

FX808364.title: FACP ES Line for 8 zones, German
FX808364.description: Compact and high-performance fire alarm control panel for monitoring small facilities, supporting up to 8 conventional sensor groups (max 240 devices). Features a large LCD display for easy operation and programming, with integrated sensor group display. Includes four programmable relays, two sounder outputs (EN 54-13), and interfaces for fire/fault transmission units and fire brigade panels. Designed for high flexibility and reliable false alarm suppression, with event memory and alarm counter. Comes with German front foil. Central control unit, complete with system software including installation material, installation, commissioning and operating manuals, operating book for BMA, but without batteries.

specs.display: Large LCD display with 8 rows x 40 characters
specs.sensor_groups: 8 sensor groups with up to 30 sensors in each sensor group (supports up to 240 conventional devices in total)
specs.relays: Four relays, freely programmable, non-monitored, potential free, max. 30 V DC / 2 A or 60 V DC / 1 A
specs.sounder_outputs: 2 outputs for connecting acoustic or optical sounders according to EN 54-13 (29 V DC/ max. 500 mA)
specs.fire_warning_interface: 1 interface to a transmission unit for fire warnings (12 V DC / max. 200 mA)
specs.fault_warning_interface: 1 interface to a transmission unit for fault warnings (12 V DC / max. 200 mA)
specs.fire_control_system_interface: 1 standard interface extinguisher for fire control system type C according to DIN EN 54-2
specs.fire_brigade_interface: RS485 for connecting to fire brigade operating panel and fire brigade display panel
specs.delay_of_relaying_function: PM operating mode according to DIN VDE 0833-2
specs.2_detection_dependency_function: TM operating mode according to DIN VDE 0833-2

FX808364.dimensions_mm: W: 450 mm H: 320 mm D: 185 mm

FX808431.title: Heavy-duty drawer with power supply unit, 5 HU
FX808431.description: Heavy-duty drawer on ball-bearing metal rails with a power supply module and space for up to four 12 V/24 Ah batteries. The drawer is designed for 5 rack units (HU). It includes: 1 x Mains adapter connection cable, 2 x Battery connection cables, 2 x Fasteners, 1 x Power supply module (PSM) FX808326 (24 V DC / 150 W) with plug-in connection cable, and 1 x PS connection module and connecting cable 0.6 m (PSC) FX808327. A dummy cover for the heavy-duty drawer PSU, 5 HU must be ordered separately.

specs.battery_support: Up to four 12 V/24 Ah batteries
specs.power_supply_module_output: 24 V DC, 150 W (for included PSM FX808326)

PANC300-03.title: PROCESS CONTROLLER OF THE FUTURE
PANC300-03.description: This document details Honeywell's C300PM process controller, an advanced solution designed to help companies benefit from a modern, unified process control platform. It integrates the capabilities of the EHPM and C300 controllers within an EHPM form factor, offering a seamless upgrade path for legacy xPM systems. The C300PM provides enhanced operational performance, robust peer-to-peer communication, a unified engineering environment, and direct HART data integration for smarter asset management, all while preserving existing control strategies and intellectual property.

Key Features: Experion PKS I/O HIVE (Highly Integrated Virtual Environment)
Multi-generational coexistence with other process controllers (C300, ControlEdge UOC)
Preserves existing control strategies and intellectual property
specs.Compatibility: Designed for migration from legacy xPM controllers (Process Manager (PM), Advanced Process Manager (APM), High Performance Process Manager (HPM), Enhanced High Performance Process Manager (EHPM))

V5050A1090.title: V5050A 3-WAY FLANGED LINEAR VALVE PN16
V5050A1090.description: These single seated valves are used for modulating control of hot / chilled water or steam in heating, ventilating and air conditioning systems. The valves can be operated by linear actuators ML6421B and M7L421B. Features include a cast iron body with flanged end connections, low seat leakage rate, metal to metal seating for long life span, self-adjusting packing, accurate positioning for state-of-the-art temperature control, easy mounting of direct coupled electric and pneumatic actuators, and constant total flow throughout full plug travel.

specs.Action: Stem up to close port A-AB
specs.Flow characteristic: Equal percentage port A-AB, linear port B-AB
Installation requirements: Do not install valve with stem below the horizontal.
Fluid flow must correspond with the arrow direction on the valve body.
The installation of a strainer is strongly recommended.
